body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-31246", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "GPT-Pilot thru commit 0819827ce20346ef5f25b3fe29293cb448840565 (2025-09-03) contains a command injection vulnerability (CWE-78) in the Executor.run() method. During project execution, when the system prompts the user to confirm or modify a command to be run, it accepts free-text input without proper validation. The user-supplied input is directly passed to asyncio.create_subprocess_shell() for execution. This allows an attacker to replace the intended command with arbitrary shell commands, leading to remote code execution with the privileges of the GPT-Pilot process.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00704, "percentile": 0.48515}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m85w-whwh-qvfx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-27T22:48:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m85w-whwh-qvfx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m85w-whwh-qvfx"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-31246"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T16:17:29Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T18:31:43Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31246", "https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot", "https://www.notion.so/CVE-2026-31246-35d1e1393188812ea3c6c88ad28d3d57", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m85w-whwh-qvfx"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Pythagora-io/gpt-pilot", "summary": "GPT-Pilot contains a command injection vulnerability in the Executor.run() method", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-27T22:48:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m85w-whwh-qvfx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "gpt-pilot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.0.10"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
